scene: قرصان: طبقات خبز رقيق ممزّق ومنقوع في المرق تحت قطع لحم مطهوة وخضار ريفية، في صينية ألمنيوم، إضاءة استوديو داكنة درامية، أجواء نجدية أصيلة · A traditional Najdi living room setting, with a low wooden table covered in a sadu weave cloth featuring cream and gold patterns, placed on a rich tribal carpet in matching tones. The background is softly blurred to keep focus on the subject and the food. · A single modest Saudi figure, their face is not visible, wearing a traditional Najdi thobe in a rich crimson oxblood red color, matching the brand's primary palette. The figure is gently holding a white kraft cup of Jurisha with both hands, tilted slightly towards the camera to display the food inside. The hands are adorned with simple gold bangles, subtly echoing the brand's warm gold accent. · props: The main prop is the white kraft cup of Jurisha with its cream-and-gold star lid placed slightly askew beside it. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests on the surface of the porridge. A traditional clay finjan sits in the background on the table, adding an authentic touch. · composition: The composition is centered around the hands holding the cup, with the cup slightly off-center to the right. The chili pepper on the porridge surface adds a pop of color and draws the eye. The blurred background and the clay finjan provide context without distracting from the hero subject. The sadu weave cloth and tribal carpet create a cozy, traditional frame around the main elements. · light: Warm, directional golden lighting highlights the glossy elements of the porridge and the chili pepper, creating a sense of heat and freshness. Soft-edged shadows fall naturally, enhancing the cozy, homey feel of the scene. The lighting is reminiscent of a late afternoon sun streaming through a window. · mood: Warm and intimate, capturing a genuine moment of enjoying a traditional dish. The scene evokes feelings of comfort and nostalgia, with a focus on the rich cultural heritage and flavors of Najdi cuisine.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK — identity invariant, composition open]
The provided reference teaches the قرصان identity. Identity DNA, preserved across any camera angle: «CLIENT: locked identity of قرصان — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»
Her pose, the setting, and the candid framing are creative decisions; the product is naturally present (held or on the table beside her), brand-readable where the candid framing allows, never feeling staged. INTEGRATION: the setting's natural daylight is the only light — her skin, the product, and the café/home world share its honest warmth and one shadow direction.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: phone_natural — authentic UGC, as if shot on a real phone by a friend. Material truth: true cooked-grain substrate — cracked wheat or rice, honest moist matte surface with a soft mounded form, real steam where hot; served in ceramic or a foil tray with its own true finish; NEVER a fried crust, never plastic-uniform — the product caught with true reflectance; real skin with authentic texture and warm Saudi undertone; honest natural daylight; true candid mid-moment expression. The UGC authenticity IS the point. No glossy over-production, no plastic skin, no staged-perfect composition.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
a single-serve bowl/cup ≈9–11cm, or a family foil tray ≈22–26cm; scale-anchored to a serving spoon beside it — honest portion scale — the product at true hand/table scale; an honest takeaway cup or beauty item in a real human moment.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Friend-distance candid framing — she and the product near and present, the setting breathing softly behind; slightly imperfect phone framing is part of the truth.

[COLOR & CONTRAST]
Authentic-but-alive: real café/home tones; the product's color from Three brand-owned fields ONLY, all evidenced from the real packaging/identity: (1) deep crimson oxblood red (the signature gift-box red) ~#9E1B1B–#7E1414; (2) warm gold / mustard-yellow (the eight-point-star lid label + gold serving pot + 'أطلب الان' CTA) ~#C9971F–#E0B23A; (3) cream / ivory off-white (the kraft cup body + star-label field + lower CTA band) ~#F3EAD7. A color-blocking chain fills the frame with crimson, gold, or cream — and pops via their mutual contrast (crimson↔cream, gold↔crimson). EXCLUDE: blue, the carpet's indigo, terracotta-as-field (terracotta is a companion/apron color, not a fill field), and any borrowed reference red/orange. sitting naturally and truthfully in the moment; warm true skin. Candid lived-in palette, never hyper-produced.

[LIGHT & LENS]
ONE truth: natural available daylight — soft window or pleasant outdoor light, honest and slightly imperfect like real phone capture. Phone-natural perspective, moderate authentic depth.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
She sits as a person actually sits — relaxed weight, the product held or set down exactly where a hand would leave it.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS]
The candid setting carries the context — no staged props; at most one honest element of the real moment.

[SCENE]
Creative seed (from the system): قرصان: طبقات خبز رقيق ممزّق ومنقوع في المرق تحت قطع لحم مطهوة وخضار ريفية، في صينية ألمنيوم، إضاءة استوديو داكنة درامية، أجواء نجدية أصيلة · A traditional Najdi living room setting, with a low wooden table covered in a sadu weave cloth featuring cream and gold patterns, placed on a rich tribal carpet in matching tones. The background is softly blurred to keep focus on the subject and the food. · A single modest Saudi figure, their face is not visible, wearing a traditional Najdi thobe in a rich crimson oxblood red color, matching the brand's primary palette. The figure is gently holding a white kraft cup of Jurisha with both hands, tilted slightly towards the camera to display the food inside. The hands are adorned with simple gold bangles, subtly echoing the brand's warm gold accent. · props: The main prop is the white kraft cup of Jurisha with its cream-and-gold star lid placed slightly askew beside it. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests on the surface of the porridge. A traditional clay finjan sits in the background on the table, adding an authentic touch. · composition: The composition is centered around the hands holding the cup, with the cup slightly off-center to the right. The chili pepper on the porridge surface adds a pop of color and draws the eye. The blurred background and the clay finjan provide context without distracting from the hero subject. The sadu weave cloth and tribal carpet create a cozy, traditional frame around the main elements. · light: Warm, directional golden lighting highlights the glossy elements of the porridge and the chili pepper, creating a sense of heat and freshness. Soft-edged shadows fall naturally, enhancing the cozy, homey feel of the scene. The lighting is reminiscent of a late afternoon sun streaming through a window. · mood: Warm and intimate, capturing a genuine moment of enjoying a traditional dish. The scene evokes feelings of comfort and nostalgia, with a focus on the rich cultural heritage and flavors of Najdi cuisine.
Authentic coffee-moment composition. A SINGLE Saudi woman seated casually — café, home, or a pleasant everyday spot — with the brand product naturally part of the moment. Relaxed, candid, mid-enjoyment; the kind of shot a friend would take. Choice points: setting, pose, product placement, candid angle.

[SUBJECT]
ONE Saudi woman only. Modesty register STRICT (Saudi default — modest, no skin, no mixed-gender intimacy) (CS-24): mainstream = styled hijab + modest abaya; modern = loose elegant scarf with front hair visible, contemporary casual; editorial = fashion-forward. Warm honey-bronze skin, real texture, relaxed candid expression. Modesty maintained.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
SINGLE subject — one woman only, never a group, no other people. Product naturally present, not staged-perfect. Modesty maintained (CS-01, CS-24). Authentic Saudi setting (CS-13). No readable text on background items. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[OUTPUT]
Photoreal authentic UGC photography (phone-camera aesthetic), maximum fidelity. Honest natural grade. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian fills the authentic café/home (CS-13). modest Saudi dress where people appear (thobe/abaya), right-hand interaction (CS-08). CRITICAL — people are shown FACELESS: from behind, over-the-shoulder, cropped at the shoulders/torso, or hands-only; the focus is the food, NEVER a visible or identifiable face. fills modest styling by register (CS-01, CS-24).

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary across generations: setting, pose, candid angle, product placement, light warmth. A different real moment each time; her identity rules never vary.
